_comment: BlackVM merged Egg: the classic and image-first variants are kept in sync.
name: BlackVM
author: blackredit@github.com
description: BlackVM – merged Pterodactyl export. The Docker image (ghcr.io/blackredit/blackvm) contains QEMU/KVM, OVMF/BIOS, noVNC and helper scripts. This export stays aligned with the canonical BlackVM egg.
startup: qemu-system-x86_64 $( [ "${USE_KVM}" == "1" ] && echo "-enable-kvm -machine {{MACHINE_TYPE}},accel=kvm -cpu host" || echo "-machine {{MACHINE_TYPE}},accel=tcg -cpu max -accel tcg,thread=multi,tb-size=128,split-wx=on" ) -smp sockets={{CPU_SOCKETS}},cores={{CPU_CORES}},threads={{CPU_THREADS}} -m {{RAM}} $( [ "${BALLOON_MEMORY}" == "1" ] && echo "-device virtio-balloon-pci" ) $( [ "${USE_UEFI}" == "1" ] && echo "-drive if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on,file=OVMF.fd" || echo "-bios bios.bin" ) $( [ "${USE_VIRTIO}" == "1" ] && echo "-drive file={{DISK_FILE}},format=qcow2,if=virtio,aio=native,cache.direct=on" || echo "-drive file={{DISK_FILE}},format=qcow2,if=ide,index=0,cache=${DISK_CACHE:-writeback}" ) $( [ -n "${SECONDARY_DISK}" ] && [ -f "${SECONDARY_DISK}" ] && echo "-drive file={{SECONDARY_DISK}},format=qcow2,if=virtio,index=1" ) $( [ -n "${ISO_FILE}" ] && [ -f "${ISO_FILE}" ] && echo "-cdrom {{ISO_FILE}}" ) $( [ -n "${SECONDARY_ISO}" ] && [ -f "${SECONDARY_ISO}" ] && echo "-drive file={{SECONDARY_ISO}},media=cdrom,if=ide,readonly=on" ) $( [ -n "${SHARED_DIR}" ] && [ -d "${SHARED_DIR}" ] && echo "-drive file=fat:rw:{{SHARED_DIR}},format=vvfat,label=SHARED" ) $( [ "${USE_VIRTIO_NET}" == "1" ] && echo "-device virtio-net-pci,netdev=n0 -netdev user,id=n0,{{FORWARD_PORTS}}" || echo "-net nic -net user,{{FORWARD_PORTS}}" ) $( [ "${USE_GPU}" == "1" ] && echo "-device virtio-gpu-gl-pci,max_hostmem=256M -display egl-headless" || echo "-vga std" ) $( [ "${SOUND_ENABLED}" == "1" ] && echo "-device ich9-intel-hda -device hda-output" ) $( [ "${ENABLE_USB3}" == "1" ] && echo "-device qemu-xhci -device usb-tablet" || echo "-usbdevice tablet" ) $( [ "${ENABLE_GUEST_AGENT}" == "1" ] && echo "-chardev socket,path=/tmp/qga.sock,server=on,wait=off,id=qga0 -device virtio-serial-pci -device virtserialport,chardev=qga0,name=org.qemu.guest_agent.0" ) -boot order=dc,menu=on,splash-time=5000 -vnc 0.0.0.0:1,password=on -monitor stdio {{EXTRA_ARGS}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Minimaler image-first Installations-Script: legt Disks an und lädt optional ISOs
apt-get update -y -qq
apt-get install -y -qq qemu-utils wget curl ca-certificates || true

cd /mnt/server || mkdir -p /mnt/server && cd /mnt/server

DISK_FILE="${DISK_FILE:-disk.qcow2}"
DISK_SIZE="${DISK_SIZE:-100G}"
SECONDARY_DISK="${SECONDARY_DISK:-}"
SECONDARY_DISK_SIZE="${SECONDARY_DISK_SIZE:-50G}"
ISO_FILE="${ISO_FILE:-netboot.xyz.iso}"
SECONDARY_ISO="${SECONDARY_ISO:-virtio-win.iso}"
AUTO_FETCH_ISO="${AUTO_FETCH_ISO:-0}"
ISO_URL="${ISO_URL:-}"
SECONDARY_ISO_URL="${SECONDARY_ISO_URL:-}"
VNC_PASSWORD="${VNC_PASSWORD:-black1234}"

echo "[BlackVM] Server setup started"

if [ ! -f "${DISK_FILE}" ]; then
  echo "[BlackVM] Create primary disk: ${DISK_FILE} (${DISK_SIZE})"
  qemu-img create -f qcow2 "${DISK_FILE}" "${DISK_SIZE}"
else
  echo "[BlackVM] Primary disk exists, skip"
fi

if [ -n "${SECONDARY_DISK}" ] && [ ! -f "${SECONDARY_DISK}" ]; then
  echo "[BlackVM] Create secondary disk: ${SECONDARY_DISK} (${SECONDARY_DISK_SIZE})"
  qemu-img create -f qcow2 "${SECONDARY_DISK}" "${SECONDARY_DISK_SIZE}"
fi

if [ "${AUTO_FETCH_ISO}" = "1" ]; then
  if [ -n "${ISO_URL}" ] && [ -n "${ISO_FILE}" ] && [ ! -f "${ISO_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "[BlackVM] Download primary ISO from ISO_URL"
    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -o "${ISO_FILE}" "${ISO_URL}"
  fi
  if [ -n "${SECONDARY_ISO_URL}" ] && [ -n "${SECONDARY_ISO}" ] && [ ! -f "${SECONDARY_ISO}" ]; then
    echo "[BlackVM] Download secondary ISO from SECONDARY_ISO_URL"
    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -o "${SECONDARY_ISO}" "${SECONDARY_ISO_URL}"
  fi
  if [ -z "${ISO_URL}" ] && [ ! -f "netboot.xyz.iso" ]; then
    echo "[BlackVM] ISO_URL empty, fallback to netboot.xyz.iso"
    wget -q --show-progress -O netboot.xyz.iso https://boot.netboot.xyz/ipxe/netboot.xyz.iso
  fi
  if [ -z "${SECONDARY_ISO_URL}" ] && [ ! -f "virtio-win.iso" ]; then
    echo "[BlackVM] SECONDARY_ISO_URL empty, fallback to virtio-win.iso"
    wget -q --show-progress -O virtio-win.iso https://fedorapeople.org/groups/virt/virtio-win/direct-downloads/stable-virtio/virtio-win.iso
  fi
fi

# Write VNC password file if provided
echo "${VNC_PASSWORD}" > .vnc_pass && chmod 600 .vnc_pass || true

echo "[BlackVM] Setup complete"

variables.name: VNC-Passwort
variables.description: Passwort für die VNC / noVNC Verbindung.

variables.name: Primäre Disk Größe (nur Installation)
variables.description: Größe der primären Disk beim ersten Einrichten.

variables.name: Sekundäre Disk Größe (nur Installation)
variables.description: Größe der zweiten Disk beim Einrichten.

variables.name: Monitor Socket Path
variables.description: Pfad fuer den QEMU Monitor Socket.

variables.name: Enable QMP Socket
variables.description: 1 = QMP Socket fuer externe Automatisierung aktivieren.
